code: import{useEffect,useState}from'react';export default function usePostDetails(id){const[post,setPost]=useState(null);const[isLoading,setIsLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{const controller=new AbortController();setIsLoading(true);setError('');fetch(`https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/${id}`,{signal:controller.signal}).then(response=>{if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Post not found');}return response.json();}).then(data=>{setPost(data);setIsLoading(false);}).catch(fetchError=>{if(fetchError.name==='AbortError'){return;}setPost(null);setError(fetchError.message||'Failed to load post');setIsLoading(false);});return()=>{controller.abort();};},[id]);return{post,isLoading,error};}
